package rulecoverage

func NegativeXmlDecoderWithoutEntityLimit() string {
    ruleID := "xml_decoder_without_entity_limit"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`xml.NewDecoder(r)` processing untrusted XML without setting `d.Entity = nil` and without input size limits"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
